title: corybas montanus
intro: Corybas montanus, also known as the mountain helmet orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the genus Corybas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corybas montanus include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Corybas montanus is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
